subcodes.first_line: My God, my God! Thou art He before Whose majesty and grandeur all necks have bowed low, and before Whose dominion all voices have been hushed in reverence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی انت الذی خضعت الاعناق لعظمتک و کبریائک و خشعت الاصوات لهیمنتک
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for specific individuals; groups
